groups.prompt:
You are reviewing possible duplicate logos/icons inside one collection.
Decide if any candidates are visually duplicate enough that one should be removed.

Collection: devtools-ci
Similarity group key: devtools-ci:neutral:95d0596a298f0abd887948e9d5cd4b00d33708e5

Candidates:
1. slug=mochajs; variant=none; flags=duplicate-raster,duplicate-raster-cross-name; image=@{output/reports/gemini-duplicate-review/2026-02-28T05-17-58-047Z/images/group-002/mochajs.png}
2. slug=npm; variant=none; flags=duplicate-raster,duplicate-raster-cross-name; image=@{output/reports/gemini-duplicate-review/2026-02-28T05-17-58-047Z/images/group-002/npm.png}
3. slug=webpack; variant=none; flags=duplicate-raster,duplicate-raster-cross-name; image=@{output/reports/gemini-duplicate-review/2026-02-28T05-17-58-047Z/images/group-002/webpack.png}

Rules:
- Keep all if symbols are meaningfully different.
- Only remove when mark/shape is effectively the same icon.
- If removing duplicates, prefer: color/brand > base > text > dark/light.
- Never remove every item; at least one item must remain.
- If confidence is low, return decision=unsure.

Return STRICT JSON only (no markdown):
{"collection":"string","groupKey":"string","decision":"keep-all|remove-some|unsure","keep":["slug"],"remove":["slug"],"confidence":0.0,"reason":"short reason"}
